title: Börserna fortsätter att stiga: "Vore konstigt om vi inte får en rekyl neråt"
summary_md:
# Börserna fortsätter att stiga: "Vore konstigt om vi inte får en rekyl neråt"

**Feed**: dagen-med-di  
**Published**: 2026-05-27  
**Market Sentiment**: Mixed

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

The episode discusses an extended equity rally (eight straight up-weeks on the S&P 500) and warns that valuations are stretched above 5- and 10-year averages, making the risk asymmetry skewed to the downside and a pullback likely. Much focus is on the AI/memory boom — Micron, SK Hynix and Samsung each crossing $1 trillion market cap on a 600% surge in memory prices — with hosts debating whether the historically cyclical memory sector can sustain its extraordinary margins or whether 'this time is different'. Nvidia's strong-but-muted reaction is cited as evidence that little upside surprise remains.

---

## Universe Stocks

### 🟠 MU — Micron | **WATCH** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Mixed | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 50%

Memory boom drove +600% price surge and 85% margins; P/E re-rated from ~6 to ~20 implying durable earnings, but sector is historically cyclical.

#### Reasoning

Hosts are impressed by the structural memory/AI demand but flag that the memory sector has always been cyclical and that current pricing and margins (~85%) should mean-revert per normal market economics. The re-rating from P/E ~6 to ~20 prices in sustained earnings; betting on that requires a 'this time is different' thesis the hosts are wary of. Constructive on the trend, cautious on valuation.

#### Sell Triggers

- if memory prices normalise/fall as supply catches up
- if margins compress from the ~85% peak
- if the cycle turns and demand growth slows

> *"tidig historisk så har man ju sett just den här minnessektorn som väldigt cyklisk ... om man inte tror att det är cykliskt, då ska man ju argumentera för att this time is different"*

---

### 🟡 NVDA — Nvidia | **HOLD** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Mixed | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 50%

Delivered extraordinary results and guided for a strong 2027, yet the stock fell — taken as evidence the asymmetry is skewed to the downside with little left to surprise positively.

#### Reasoning

The AI case is described as fundamentally stronger than ever and Nvidia as the motor of the trend, but the muted/negative reaction to a clearly extraordinary report signals expectations are fully priced. With markets at all-time highs and valuations above 5- and 10-year averages, hosts see limited upside surprise and skewed downside risk, implying hold rather than fresh buying.

#### Sell Triggers

- if AI capex shifts from cash-funded to debt-funded, raising rate sensitivity
- if a broad market pullback materialises from stretched positioning
- if forward guidance disappoints

> *"Alla förväntade sig extraordinära siffror, vi fick extraordinära siffror. Men marknaden rycker upp."*

---
